pr_summary_ru: Добавлен web read-only resume для уже начатого N1: mounted /profile/session при RESUME_N1 читает route-progress и lesson detail, не отправляя повторный POST /start. START_N1 первый старт сохранён. Token остаётся только в mounted memory; full MVP-06/MVP-07/MVP and human gates remain open.

evidence, docs, progress, status and publish_manifest are current
human-gated items are not declared fully closed without human approval

pr_body_ru:
## Цель
- Закрыть web gap для повторного открытия mounted `/profile/session`, когда сервер уже знает `N1 STARTED` / `RESUME_N1`.
- Не отправлять повторный `POST /api/v1/learning/me/lessons/N1/start` ради render existing continuation.

## Что сделано
- `/profile/session` при `RESUME_N1` читает generated route-progress и generated N1 lesson detail, затем рендерит backend-owned continuation.
- `START_N1` первый старт сохранён: user click вызывает generated `startLearningMeLesson`, refresh route-progress and fetch lesson detail.
- Добавлены focused web test and browser smoke scenario with structured network proof: no diagnostic submit and no learning-start request on read-only resume.
- Token remains only in mounted component memory; browser smoke checks URL/storage/cookie/IndexedDB surfaces.
- `docs/architecture/access-and-subscriptions.md` 7.4 updated for read-only reopen/resume boundary.

## Как проверить
- `pnpm --filter @finrhythm/web test`
- `pnpm --filter @finrhythm/web typecheck`
- `pnpm --filter @finrhythm/web build`
- `JAVA_HOME=/opt/homebrew/opt/openjdk@21 PATH=$JAVA_HOME/bin:$PATH cd apps/api && ./mvnw -q -Dtest=LearningProgressControllerIT test`
- `JAVA_HOME=/opt/homebrew/opt/openjdk@21 PATH=$JAVA_HOME/bin:$PATH cd apps/api && ./mvnw -q verify`
- `pnpm --filter @finrhythm/api-client check:generated`
- `pnpm --filter @finrhythm/api-client check:openapi-drift`
- `pnpm --filter @finrhythm/api-client typecheck`
- `pnpm --filter @finrhythm/api-client build`
- `make verify`
- `make test-unit`
- `make build`
- Builder browser proof: `.agent/stages/mvp/raw/builder-MVP-07-n1-readonly-resume-continuation-001-20260514/browser-smoke/MVP-07-n1-readonly-resume-continuation-001-browser-smoke.json`
- Verifier browser proof: `.agent/stages/mvp/raw/verifier-MVP-07-n1-readonly-resume-continuation-001-20260514-fresh/browser-smoke/MVP-07-n1-readonly-resume-continuation-001-verifier-browser-smoke.json`

## Риски и примечания
- Fresh verifier PASS: `.agent/stages/mvp/verdicts/MVP-07-n1-readonly-resume-continuation-001.json`.
- Full MVP-06, full MVP-07, MVP stage and human gates remain open.
- No backend/API/schema/OpenAPI/generated-client changes were introduced.
- No final scoring, R1-R6, HR reports, analytics/events, points/rewards, learning completion, quiz/practice submission, advice, exact sensitive data or customer brand.
continuation_prompt: Продолжи разработку FinPulse как stage_orchestrator в /Users/elena/cursor/FinPulse. Базовая ветка main уже обновлена после merge предыдущего PR. Latest fresh verifier PASS: MVP-07-n1-readonly-resume-continuation-001. Реализовано и опубликовано: mounted /profile/session read-only N1 resume continuation; when route-progress already returns N1 STARTED / RESUME_N1, web renders backend-owned N1 through GET route-progress + GET lesson detail without POST /start; token remains only in mounted component memory. Обязательно используй repo-local $stage-launch-proof-loop: spec freeze -> build -> evidence -> fresh verify -> minimal fix -> fresh verify. Выбери следующий маленький high-impact product slice, который продолжает learning delivery / diagnostics / route-progress after read-only N1 resume and проверяется тестами/browser evidence. Не делай analysis-only/doc-only работу. Запреты: не делать final scoring, final route assignment, R1-R6, HR reports, analytics/events, points, rewards, learning completion или financial advice; не добавлять customer brand в employee-facing UI; не закрывать full MVP-06, MVP-07, MVP stage или human gates; diagnostic/profile-session token должен оставаться только в mounted component memory: без URL/query/hash/localStorage/sessionStorage/cookies/IndexedDB. После fresh PASS снова выполни post-PASS publish flow: branch codex/..., commit only this slice, PR to main, wait checks, merge when allowed, switch local workspace to main, git pull --ff-only, затем напечатай следующий copyable continuation prompt.
